home.projectCtaDesc: Browse DIY guides for every skill level.
home.aboutDesc: We build things and write about them. Every tutorial on this site has been tested in our own workshop.
home.slideProjectsDesc: Step-by-step guides, honest tool reviews, and cost breakdowns from people who build what they write about.
home.slideWorkshopDesc: Fewer tools, better results. We tested hundreds so you don't have to.
home.slideToolsDesc: Beyond the marketing claims. What we actually use in the workshop every day.
home.mastSub: DIY projects with real material lists, honest costs, and the tools we'd actually use again. We write plans we'd follow ourselves — not content.
home.finderDesc: Project, skill level, budget, timeframe. We'll point you at the one tool that unlocks the most next projects — not the full catalog.
home.newsletterPromoDesc: One project plan, one tool review, one weekend brief — in your inbox every Thursday. No filler, unsubscribe any time.
home.mobileSubhead: Honest project plans. Tool reviews we paid for. No AI-generated nonsense.
home.toolFinderMobileBody: Answer 4 questions. Get a shopping list for your exact first project — nothing more, nothing less.
home.honestTestBadge: ◆ We buy every tool we test. No loaners, no freebies.
home.saturdayHeadline: One project, one tool, one fix — every Saturday 7am.
home.saturdayBody: Cup of coffee in hand. Weekend plan on your phone. Free, always.
home.saturdayStats: ◆ 12,400+ BUILDERS · ◆ ZERO SPAM · ◆ UNSUB ANY TIME
home.mobileFooterTagline: Built in a small shop in Portland, OR. Written by people who actually own miter saws.
home.mobileAffiliate: AMZ AFFILIATE · buildcoded-20 · WE EARN ON PURCHASES

footer.brandDesc: We build everything before we write about it. If it didn't work in our workshop, it's not on this site.
footer.newsletterDesc: Weekly project ideas, tool reviews & workshop tips. No spam, just builds.
